name: Step-by-Step Response to Machine Entanglement Injuries

mainEntity.name: What immediate steps to take after a conveyor belt entanglement at work in Boise?
mainEntity.text: What immediate steps to take after a conveyor belt entanglement at work in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. Seek medical care immediately. 2. Report injury to employer verbally and in writing. 3. Document scene photos and witnesses. 4. File formal claim via Labor Commission if disputed.[5][4]

suggestedAnswer.text: After entanglement injuries, prioritize ER treatment to create medical records linking to the accident. Notify supervisor ASAP, request Employer's First Report form. Take photos of machine guards or hazards before cleanup. Utah's Industrial Accidents Division helps resolve disputes. In Boise or Murray, local attorneys prevent insurer delays in benefits.[1][5]
